positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    severe_cancer(bile_duct_cancer_inst)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~severe_cancer(colorectal_cancer)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define deadly_disease(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define low_survival_rate(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define bile_duct_cancer(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define cholangiocarcinoma(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
